headline: Stock Futures Jump. Market Rally Gathers Pace as Earnings Season Ramps Up.
summary: Stocks looked set to rise again on Wednesday, building on gains from the previous session that were powered by a solid start to the second-quarter earnings season and cooler-than-expected inflation data.  Nasdaq 100 futures added 0.4%.  Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose 81 points, or 0.2%.

content.title: Stock Futures Jump. Market Rally Gathers Pace as Earnings Season Ramps Up.
content.summary: Stocks looked set to rise again on Wednesday, building on gains from the previous session that were powered by a solid start to the second-quarter earnings season and cooler-than-expected inflation data.  Nasdaq 100 futures added 0.4%.  Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose 81 points, or 0.2%.

headline: United Posts Q2 Results Above Wall Street Expectations and Raises Full-Year 2026 Adjusted EPS Guidance¹ Despite a Nearly $6 Billion Increase In Anticipated Fuel Costs
summary: United Airlines (UAL) today reported a second-quarter profit that exceeded expectations and is near the top-end of guidance. United delivered pre-tax earnings of $1.0 billion, with a pre-tax margin of 5.8%. Adjusted pre-tax earnings2 were $843 million, with an adjusted pre-tax margin2 of 4.8%.

United delivered pre-tax earnings of $1.0 billion, with a pre-tax margin of 5.8%. Adjusted pre-tax earnings2 were $843 million, with an adjusted pre-tax margin2 of 4.8%.

headline: United Airlines beats Q2 expectations, raises full-year EPS outlook
summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines reported stronger-than-expected second-quarter results on Wednesday and raised its full-year adjusted earnings outlook, as robust demand for premium travel and international routes helped offset higher fuel costs.

content.title: United Airlines beats Q2 expectations, raises full-year EPS outlook

headline: United Airlines’s (NASDAQ:UAL) Q2 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Airline company United Airlines Holdings (NASDAQ:UAL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 16% year on year to $17.67 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.99 per share was 7.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: United raises 2026 outlook despite warning of $6 billion fuel cost hit
summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines (NASDAQ: UAL) reported better-than-expected second-quarter earnings on Wednesday and raised its full-year adjusted profit forecast, even as the carrier warned that a renewed surge in oil prices will add nearly $6 billion to its fuel bill this year.

content.title: United raises 2026 outlook despite warning of $6 billion fuel cost hit
content.summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines (NASDAQ: UAL) reported better-than-expected second-quarter earnings on Wednesday and raised its full-year adjusted profit forecast, even as the carrier warned that a renewed surge in oil prices will add nearly $6 billion to its fuel bill this year.
